content.en:
"This is it!"

Ye Tian looked at an island in front of him, determined the specific location, and affirmed.

This kind of island is a relatively common place in the source sea, but most of the islands have no value, and there are almost no resources produced on them, but for ordinary cultivators, every grass and tree on the island is a treasure, after all, under the influence of the source energy of the source sea, the plants and trees that can survive here are naturally extraordinary, but they are of no use to the invincible, and no one comes to pick them.

Ordinary cultivators were unable to enter the Source Sea, resulting in almost no attention to the islands of the Source Sea.

However, such an island has given birth to an eternal source.

At this time, this island has been covered by the large array arranged by Jin Zu to hide the breath of the eternal source object, even Ye Tian is difficult to sense the breath of the eternal source object, if he didn't get the memory of Jin Zu, he would not have thought of having the eternal source object here.

Wow!

Ye Tian stepped into the island, tore out a portal in the way that Jin Zu remembered, and walked into the interior of the large array.

As soon as he entered the mysterious array, he saw a thunderstone emitting black thunder.

Ye Tian really didn't know what this Eternal Source Thing was, because Jin Zu didn't know either, after all, before the Eternal Source Thing was completely born, no one could deduce the specific Eternal Source Thing.

At this time, Ye Tian saw this thunder stone, and then he recognized it.

"It turned out to be the Black Thunder Stone ranked 199th in the Eternal Source Thing!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

The value of the Black Thunder Stone is incomparably high, although the ranking is not as good as the eternal source of the Void Gold Mountain, but it is more than a hundred, and the gap is not very large.

Moreover, the black thunder stone can release the power of the thunder source, and the power of this thunder source can quench the body, although the effect of refining the physique is not as good as the Void Golden Fruit, but it can always quench the body!

Of course, if you keep using the Black Thunder Stone Quenching Body, it will consume the Origin Power of the Black Thunder Stone.

In addition, the Black Thunder Stone Quenching will hurt the invincible itself, so it is necessary to prepare a large amount of healing materials, otherwise it will not have too good an effect.

"I'm thinking about refining my physical body, and the Black Thunder Stone can at least make my physical body a little higher. "

Ye Tian thought.

So, he immediately took the Black Thunder Stone and went to the other two places where the Eternal Source was located.

It's a pity that those two Eternal Source Objects have not been completely conceived, so Ye Tian can only choose to give up and wait for the future to come and take away these two Eternal Source Objects.

Hall of Void Source.

Ye Tian's body obtained the Black Thunder Stone, and began to use the Black Thunder Stone to refine his physique, and prepared a lot of healing treasures, some of which were exchanged for resources from the Heavenly Wind Sea, and some of which were purchased from the Chamber of Commerce under the command of some other forces.

Subsequently, Ye Tian's body began to cultivate the retreat.

At the same time, Ye Tian began to slaughter a large number of robber beasts, using them in exchange for resources, and then buying treasures that could have a refining effect on his body and soul.

And just like that, the long years passed.

Before you know it, hundreds of years of the Great Tribulation have passed.

At this time, the human race gave birth to several invincible people, one of which was Ye Jinpeng, and he was already a fifth-class invincible.

Compared to Ye Tian, Ye Jinpeng's progress behind him is naturally very slow, but compared to other invincible people, such a speed is terrifying.

And in these hundreds of Great Tribulation Periods, Ye Tian spent almost all of his net worth, and the countless Tribulation Beasts hunted by the Hundreds of Great Tribulation Ages was an astronomical amount, and they were all spent, and they were used to buy a variety of treasures that were no less than the Void Golden Fruit.

At the beginning, these treasures had a good effect on him, but if he ate too many treasures like the Void Mi Golden Fruit, the effect became worse and worse.

And Ye Tian's Endless Source Body and cultivation have all been raised to the extreme of a second-class invincible, and there is no way to continue to improve.

In addition, Ye Tian also created the Supreme Ancestral Technique, and through the body transformation caused by the Supreme Ancestral Technique, his strength has also increased a lot.

There is not just one supreme ancestral technique he has created, but there are many kinds.

In order to create a top-notch supreme ancestral skill, Ye Tian often went to the Void Source Monument and spent all the points in his hand.

Now, Ye Tian's strength is much, much bigger than before.

But even so, Ye Tian went to break into the third layer of the Void Tower, but in the end he failed.

"There's only one last option left, studying fit. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

this day.

Ye Tian copied Ye Jinpeng's body, and then began to study Ye Jinpeng's soul.

This is tantamount to studying himself on his own, he doesn't even have to care about the damage to his soul, once the soul collapses, it's a big deal to replicate it again.

Therefore, even Ye Jinpeng himself did not dare to do this, but Ye Tian dared.

This is equivalent to having countless materials, and no one else has such means, even if the Void Source Ancestor is still alive, there is no way to study the fit like Ye Tian.

At the beginning, Ye Tian scrapped Ye Jinpeng's soul several times, but he didn't come up with anything.

But for the fifth time, Ye Tian finally discovered the specialness of Ye Jinpeng's soul.

If the soul is decomposed into countless soul particles, then the ordinary soul particles are the same, but there are very few soul particles in the depths of Ye Jinpeng's soul that are different from other soul particles, and these few soul particles are very consistent with the origin fluctuations of the Eternal Soul Wood.

It was precisely because of the existence of these special soul particles that Ye Jinpeng was able to reach 100% of the Eternal Soul Wood Origin, so that he could easily absorb the power of the Eternal Soul Wood Origin to refine his soul strength.

In the following days, Ye Tian began to study these special soul particles, thus changing his soul structure and constructing these special soul particles.

This step is very difficult, but Ye Tian has been researching, and even using his own copy body and soul to study, failing again and again.

Finally, after studying the three Great Tribulation Era Epochs and failing countless times, Ye Tian finally succeeded.

Of course, after the first success, Ye Tian did not immediately let the ontology try, but continued to study until he succeeded every time, which made the soul of the ontology start to try.

Deep in the soul of the body.

Ye Tian chose a small soul area, and selected a small number of soul particles in this soul area, treating these soul particles as stars in the starry sky, and then he used the eternal soul rules to transform these soul stars step by step from the root, and after years of evolution, they finally became Ye Jinpeng's soul particle stars.

In the process of evolution, no single step can be wrong, which is why Ye Tian spent three great tribulation eras.

Now, Ye Tian's compatibility with the Eternal Soul Wood is also 100%, and he can absorb the origin of the Eternal Soul Wood to enhance his soul strength.

However, he doesn't have the Eternal Soul Wood now, and the little Eternal Soul Wood Origin on Ye Jinpeng is too little, he can't look down on it, and even if he does, he won't snatch the opportunity of his juniors.

Therefore, he set his sights on Jin Zu's corpse and the Eternal Soul Wood on his body.

Although Long Ze is extremely dangerous, if he is not a supreme, once he enters Long Ze, he is almost certain to die.

But Ye Tian had already thought of a way.
